core_mechanism: exact global energy/cost minimization by reformulating it as a polynomial-time combinatorial network-flow optimization (maximum-flow / minimum-cut and minimum-cost flow) whose optimal flow or cut yields the true ground state
brief_reason: The abstract frames ground-state calculation of disordered systems as convex cost-flow problems solved exactly with network-flow algorithms (shortest path, maximum-flow, minimum-cost-flow), i.e. energy minimization recast as an exactly-solvable flow/cut optimization.
